p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests: test_markdown_table_formatting (checks SKILL.md table format with spaces), test_vue_svelte_test_specs_exist (checks for Vue/Svelte test specs in HTML parser), test_lib_rs_module_declaration (checks module declaration style in lib.rs). Updated eval_manifest.yaml with 3 new p2p checks (markdown_table_formatting, vue_svelte_test_specs_exist, lib_rs_module_declaration). All new p2p tests pass on base commit. Docker build successful. Repo: biomejs/biome, base_commit: c047e86583434beb33ed4fb0b49e627d26a8afbd. No CI commands added because Docker image lacks Rust toolchain.

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh - the embedded git patch had a missing trailing newline causing 'corrupt patch at line 621'. Replaced with Python-based apply script that manually creates directive_ext.rs, updates lib.rs, updates html.rs imports and adds Vue/Svelte directive parsing logic and helper functions, creates biome-developer SKILL.md, updates testing-codegen SKILL.md with Parser Development section, updates skills README.md, and updates AGENTS.md with new do/don't rules. Fixed markdown table formatting in biome-developer SKILL.md - removed compact table separators that were being flagged by the test. All 12 tests now pass.
